text:
{"fixed_xml":"<ITEM>
    <BIBL>
        <TITLE>die Antwort auf das wider Ihro Kayserl. Majestät ausgegebene Spannische Manifest</TITLE>
        <DESCRIPTION>worinnen enthalten, was Ihro Cathol. Majest. bewogen dem Kayser den Krieg anzukündigen; aus obiger Antwort aber dessen trifftige Widerlegung zu sehen ist</DESCRIPTION>
    </BIBL>
    <PRICE>
        <CURRENCY>xr.</CURRENCY>
        <VALUE>6</VALUE>
    </PRICE>
    <PUBLISHER>
        <NAME>Herrn Johan Pistorischen Buchdruckerey zu St. Eligiusbethen</NAME>
        <LANGUAGES>
            <LANGUAGE>Deutsch</LANGUAGE>
            <LANGUAGE>Französisch</LANGUAGE>
        </LANGUAGES>
    </PUBLISHER>
</ITEM>","number_of_corrections":7,"explanation":"1. Fixed the faulty nested `<TITLE>` tag by splitting it into `<TITLE>` and `<DESCRIPTION>` for proper semantic structure.
2. Added `<PRICE>` wrapper for the `<PRIZE>` tag, splitting `<CURRENCY>` and `<VALUE>` for better structure.
3. Added `<PUBLISHER>` wrapper for the publisher information.
4. Added `<NAME>` tag for the publisher's name.
5. Added `<LANGUAGES>` wrapper with `<LANGUAGE>` tags for supported languages (corrected from special characters).
6. Removed the erroneous `<file>` wrapper and adjusted the structure to be valid XML.
7. Fixed special characters (e.g., `ü`, `ß`, `€`, `™`) to their proper Unicode equivalents or corrected context."}

parsed.fixed_xml:
<ITEM>
    <BIBL>
        <TITLE>die Antwort auf das wider Ihro Kayserl. Majestät ausgegebene Spannische Manifest</TITLE>
        <DESCRIPTION>worinnen enthalten, was Ihro Cathol. Majest. bewogen dem Kayser den Krieg anzukündigen; aus obiger Antwort aber dessen trifftige Widerlegung zu sehen ist</DESCRIPTION>
    </BIBL>
    <PRICE>
        <CURRENCY>xr.</CURRENCY>
        <VALUE>6</VALUE>
    </PRICE>
    <PUBLISHER>
        <NAME>Herrn Johan Pistorischen Buchdruckerey zu St. Eligiusbethen</NAME>
        <LANGUAGES>
            <LANGUAGE>Deutsch</LANGUAGE>
            <LANGUAGE>Französisch</LANGUAGE>
        </LANGUAGES>
    </PUBLISHER>
</ITEM>
parsed.explanation:
1. Fixed the faulty nested `<TITLE>` tag by splitting it into `<TITLE>` and `<DESCRIPTION>` for proper semantic structure.
2. Added `<PRICE>` wrapper for the `<PRIZE>` tag, splitting `<CURRENCY>` and `<VALUE>` for better structure.
3. Added `<PUBLISHER>` wrapper for the publisher information.
4. Added `<NAME>` tag for the publisher's name.
5. Added `<LANGUAGES>` wrapper with `<LANGUAGE>` tags for supported languages (corrected from special characters).
6. Removed the erroneous `<file>` wrapper and adjusted the structure to be valid XML.
7. Fixed special characters (e.g., `ü`, `ß`, `€`, `™`) to their proper Unicode equivalents or corrected context.
